tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
ip access-list extended ICMP-FROM-192.168.1.3
 permit icmp host 203.0.113.2 any
 exit
end
show ip access-lists ICMP-FROM-192.168.1.3
show policy-map interface GigabitEthernet0/1
show policy-map interface GigabitEthernet0/0
show running-config | section access-list
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
enable
Switch#configure terminal
Enter configuration commands, one per line.  End with CNTL/Z.
Switch(config)#ip access-list extended ICMP-FROM-192.168.1.3
Switch(config-ext-nacl)# permit icmp host 203.0.113.2 any
Switch(config-ext-nacl)# exit
Switch(config)#end
Switch#show ip access-lists ICMP-FROM-192.168.1.3
Extended IP access list ICMP-FROM-192.168.1.3
    10 permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
    20 permit icmp host 203.0.113.2 any
Switch#show policy-map interface GigabitEthernet0/1

    Class-map: ICMP-FROM-WKPTXS (match-any)

      5 minute offered rate 0000 bps, drop rate 0000 bps

        5 minute rate 0 bps

          cir 128000 bps, bc 16000 bytes
        conformed 0 packets, 0 bytes; actions:
          transmit 
        exceeded 0 packets, 0 bytes; actions:
          drop 
        conformed 0000 bps, exceeded 0000 bps

    Class-map: class-default (match-any)

      5 minute offered rate 0000 bps, drop rate 0000 bps
      Match: any

      Match: access-group name ICMP-FROM-192.168.1.3
        0 packets, 0 bytes
        5 minute rate 0 bps

          cir 128000 bps, bc 16000 bytes
        conformed 0 packets, 0 bytes; actions:
          transmit 
        exceeded 0 packets, 0 bytes; actions:
          drop 
        conformed 0000 bps, exceeded 0000 bps

    Class-map: class-default (match-any)  
      0 packets, 0 bytes
      5 minute offered rate 0000 bps, drop rate 0000 bps
      Match: any 
Switch#show running-config | section access-list
ip access-list extended ICMP-CPU
 permit icmp any any
ip access-list extended ICMP-FROM-192.168.1.3
 permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
 permit icmp host 203.0.113.2 any
Switch#
